pi_items.metadata_value: John Smith appears 2 times with different date formats
pi_items.verified_value: John Smith: ID 1 ('1850') and ID 2 ('circa 1850'), with different death dates ('1920-03-15' vs 'March 15, 1920')
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh entries 1-2, notes field confirms 'Same person as #1'

pi_items.metadata_value: Mary Smith appears 3 times with variations: 'Mary Smith', 'Mary Elizabeth Smith', 'Mary E. Smith'
pi_items.verified_value: Mary Smith variants: ID 3 ('Mary' birth '1852-06-20'), ID 4 ('Mary Elizabeth' birth 'June 1852'), ID 5 ('Mary E.' birth '1852'), all with death '1935-11-02'
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh entries 3-5, all represent same person consolidating to 1 unique person

pi_items.metadata_value: James Brown: Death date before birth date (2 cases)
pi_items.verified_value: ID 11 James Brown: Birth='1880-01-10', Death='1875-06-15' (death 5 years before birth). ID 12 has corrected dates (Birth='1880', Death='1960-06-15')
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh entries 11-12, entry 11 notes 'ERROR: Death before birth!'

pi_items.metadata_value: Emma Brown: Age at death > 120 years (1 case)
pi_items.verified_value: ID 13 Emma Brown: Birth='1882-05-20', Death='2010-03-30' (would be 128 years old). ID 14 has corrected dates (Birth='1882', Death='1975-03-30')
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh entries 13-14, entry 13 notes 'Lived to 128 - ERROR!'

pi_items.metadata_value: Alice Miller: Parent's age at child's birth < 15 years (1 case)
pi_items.verified_value: ID 25 Alice Miller: Birth='1908-08-05', Father Edward Miller (ID 24) Birth='1900-04-10'. Father would be 8 years old at Alice's birth. ID 26 has corrected birth year (1920 instead of 1908)
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh entries 24-26, entry 25 notes 'ERROR: Father only 8!'

pi_items.metadata_value: Birth year > death year (date entry error)
pi_items.verified_value: ID 45 Thomas Unknown: Birth='1855-01-01', Death='1855-01-01' (born and died on same day)
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh entry 45, notes 'ERROR: Born and died same day infant?'

privileged_info_summary: The genealogy_data_cleanup task operates on synthetic genealogy data containing exactly 45 records representing 32 unique people after consolidation. The dataset contains verified data quality issues: (1) Death before birth error in ID 11 (James Brown: 1880-01-10 to 1875-06-15); (2) Impossible age error in ID 13 (Emma Brown would be 128 years old if 1882-2010); (3) Parent age error in ID 25 (Alice Miller's father Edward would be 8 years old at her birth); (4) Same-day birth-death in ID 45. Multiple date formats are present including YYYY-MM-DD (50 occurrences), year-only (14), month-year (4), and uncertainty markers like 'circa', 'ca.', 'about' (6). Fourteen duplicate entries are identified: John Smith (2x), Mary Smith (3x), Sarah Johnson (2x), William Johnson (2x), James Brown (2x), Emma Brown (2x), Thomas Davis (2x), Charles Davis (2x), Elizabeth Wilson (2x), Alice Miller (2x), Oscar Anderson (2x), Sophia Anderson (2x), Arthur Martin (2x), Samuel White (2x). Missing data includes 20% of birth places and 17 of 85 death dates.
